name: Cream Cheese Fudge Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese and chocolate, mixing well.
2. Stir in the vanilla wafers and preserves until combined.
3. Chill several hours or overnight.
4. Shape into 1-inch balls; roll in almonds, cocoa powder, or powdered sugar.
Variation: Use butterscotch chips instead of semisweet chocolate pieces.
